creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, 04 Sep 2013 21:36:03 +0200 Grzegorz Blach wrote:
> x11-wm/enlightenment freeze during startup when evas-core is build by
> clang, so USE_GCC=any must stay here until this bug will be resolved.

Ok, I see that bapt has already committed a similar patch.
I'll see if I can reproduce this and figure out what the problem is.
